name: Oriental Plum Sauce Marinade
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Plum sauce - OR Duck sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the plum sauce, hoisin, sherry and soy sauce in a nonreactive mixing bowl.
2. Whisk in the oils a little at a time.
3. Add the ginger, garlic, cilantro and chili pepper.
4. Makes 2 cups. Recommended cuts: Chicken Breasts (4 to 6 hours), Chicken Wings (6 to 8 hours), Spare Ribs (8 hours to overnight).
